title: Admin Lockout When Active Users Exceed Available Seats
story: As a product administrator who has exceeded my user seat limit, I want to see a clear message explaining the situation and be restricted to basic account management functions, so that I can resolve the discrepancy by disabling users or upgrading my subscription.
description:
When an admin's active users exceed their available seats, restrict admin access to the account settings page only and display a clear 'Active Users Exceeded' message explaining the situation and resolution steps. Shared end users continue to operate normally and are not notified of the discrepancy.

The message directs admins to either disable active users to match available seats or increase their subscription. Contact information for support is provided.
acceptance_criteria: Admin is restricted to basic functions when active users exceed available seats
Message reads 'Active Users Exceeded' with clear instructions
Admin can access My Account page to disable users
Shared end users are not impacted or notified
Admin access is restored when active users match or fall below available seats
ux_changes: 'Active Users Exceeded' message page shown to admins on all routes except account settings. Clear instructions for resolution.
middleware_changes: Middleware blocks admin access to all routes except account settings when active users exceed available seats.
implementation_notes: The lockout only affects admins. End users continue to use the product unaffected. Message text was refined for professional tone and clarity.
comment_summary: Developer implemented admin lockout with redirect to message page. Product refined the message copy. Deployed to staging for review.
